rows.label: qev040602_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah! You're...! You came
at a good time-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0002
rows.name:
An incredibly gluttonous monster has
been chasing Muimui endlessly-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0003
rows.name:
Are you Muimui's comrade-mo? Help me
quickly-mo!? Show me the bond of BLADE-mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_SEL0011
rows.name: Say that his little brother asked you to come.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_JNK0020
rows.name: Passion[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_SEL0021
rows.name: Speak passionately, saying that now is the time to show the power of your bond.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0010
rows.name:
Then this will be quick-mo!
Look... it's already coming-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0013
rows.name:
Bonds are great because they're free-mo!
Look... it's already coming-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0020
rows.name:
Phew, you really did come
at the perfect time-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0021
rows.name:
Muimui finally found the location
of the Sword of Legendaryness-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0022
rows.name:
So, when I was investigating where the
signal came from, those guys spotted
me... and it turned into this mess-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0023
rows.name:
Muimui couldn't do anything
alone, so I was running around
in circles worrying about it-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_JNK0030
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask about the location of the Sword of Legendaryness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_JNK0040
rows.name: Worry[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_SEL0041
rows.name: Worry about Muimui and express relief that he is safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0030
rows.name:
Believe it or not... there was a
radar reaction coming from inside
the stomach of their boss-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0031
rows.name:
Knowing those gluttons, they must have
gobbled up the Sword of Legendaryness-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0034
rows.name:
With Moimoi's specially made
Infinigoggles, there is no enemy
Muimui can't run away from-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0035
rows.name:
Setting that aside, I want you
to go retrieve the Sword of
Legendaryness immediately-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0036
rows.name:
There was a massive reaction from the
Legen-dar coming from the stomach of
the boss of the guys chasing me-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0039
rows.name:
Please-mo, I'll send you their
location, so go defeat them
quickly just like you did now-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0040
rows.name:
Once I get the Sword of
Legendaryness and strike it rich...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0041
rows.name:
I'll treat you to lunch or something,
okay-mo? I'm counting on you-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0044
rows.name:
When I followed the Legen-dar's
reaction, I arrived at the place
where their boss is-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0045
rows.name:
The Sword of Legendaryness must
definitely be inside its stomach-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0046
rows.name:
Please-mo! For the sake of Muimui
and Moimoi's massive profit, get
it back no matter what-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0050
rows.name:
It really was inside the
stomach-mo~! I finally found
it... the Sword of Legendaryness-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0052
rows.name:
With this, Muimui and Moimoi will
get a massive reward and escape
poverty-mo~! I'm so happy-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0053
rows.name:
...Thank you-mo! I'm going to
show Moimoi right away-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0054
rows.name:
Just as promised, I'll treat
you to lunch or something, so
hurry back to NLA too-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0059
rows.name: N-no way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040602_MSG0060
rows.name:
Even though we went through all that
trouble... to think the Sword of
Legendaryness... isn't here-mo...[ST:wait ]
